case_title: C. CARTER VS TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,260.00 FILED BY C. CARTER AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C. CARTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. PLAINTIFF MOVED TO CONTINUE CASE BEFORE 3:30 PM CALENDAR, VIA PHONE CALL TO MR CARTER, WHO RELAYED REQUEST TO COURT; REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
